title: Zoho Sheet Workbook
description: Represents a Zoho Sheet workbook (spreadsheet file) and its metadata

resource_id.description: Unique identifier for the workbook used in API requests

worksheet_list.description: List of worksheets contained in the workbook

created_time.description: Timestamp when the workbook was created

modified_time.description: Timestamp when the workbook was last modified

worksheet.title: Worksheet
worksheet.description: A single sheet (tab) within a Zoho Sheet workbook

sheet_index.description: Zero-indexed position of the worksheet in the workbook
